name: Authentic Holdings, Inc.
business: Authentic Holdings is a multi-faceted media and merchandising company with operating subsidiaries including Authentic Heroes (Fan-wear collectibles, vinyl records, NFTs) and Maybacks Global Entertainment (over-the-air television network). It also holds a license for over 14,000 full-length motion pictures and serial television shows. The company generates revenue from advertising, content distribution, and sales of collectibles and vinyl records.

exposures.sentence: The Authentic Heroes, Inc. subsidiary has patented technology that takes the original event worn apparel from an iconic individual and creates Fan-wear collectibles containing fibers from that original.

The Authentic Heroes subsidiary is also in the business of creating vinyl records for distribution into retail department stores and online sales and has pressed 150,000 vinyl records to date under the heading of Old is Gold Christmas.
Maybacks is an Over the Air and platform driven television network.
The NFT platform has minted 500,000 NFTs as part of free music NFT given away with its Old is Gold Christmas album.
the Company plans to tokenize all the titles, namely 14,000 plus full-length motion pictures and serial television shows.

catalysts.event: Start tokenization process within 30 days of filing; Alpha version within 90 days
catalysts.sentence: It is the Company s intention to start the tokenization process within thirty (30) days of this filing and have the Alpha version completed within 90 days from its start date.

catalysts.event: Release Tommy DeVito commemorative collectible after NFL Mini Camp
catalysts.sentence: We are in the process of making samples that should be approved in the coming weeks and expect to release this commemorative collectible on our new E-Commerce site subsequent to NFL Mini Camp.

catalysts.event: Create Authentic Events Group for Pay-Per-View events
catalysts.sentence: We will be soon creating Authentic Events Group, LLC for the distribution of several Pay-Per-View ( PPV ) events we have been offered and will be contracted with over the coming weeks.
